name: Red Thread
description: Agentic operating system for luxury hospitality. Agent-to-agent handoff for guest preference exchange — consent-based, structured, schema-governed.

endpoints.name: guest_preference_handoff
endpoints.description: Inbound: a guest's personal agent may submit a structured preference packet ahead of arrival. Consent required.

policies.privacy_openness_score: Guest-overridable scalar (0–100) gates depth of inferred context.
policies.discretion_layer: Second-pass model filters any signal that crosses the surveillance threshold.
